title: Essentially Tweaked
description: Essentially Tweaked is a resource pack that aims to improve the textures of the game while still keeping the Vanilla feel.
body:
###
[ v4.0 1.20.5 - 26.1 ]
Essentially Tweaked is a resource pack that aims to improve the textures of the game while still keeping the Vanilla feel. > Latest changes: > Updated to 26.1 > Works on 1.20.5+ > Updated Connected Glass Textures --- ![Image of some changes make from the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYqUp1dA/images/d38dbe2c3760515c34be3dde34dca3c8cb823f01.png) Go to the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/essentially-tweaked/gallery) to view more Screenshots Use [Opitfine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to have connected textures.
